projects.title: AI-Powered Medical Diagnosis System
projects.description: Developed a machine learning system for early disease detection using medical imaging. Achieved 92% accuracy on validation datasets while maintaining HIPAA compliance standards.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive medical diagnosis platform utilizing deep learning models trained on medical imaging data. The system assists healthcare professionals in identifying potential health issues early, improving patient outcomes through timely intervention.

projects.title: Real-Time Financial Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Built a full-stack analytics platform with real-time market data visualization, AI-powered insights, and portfolio tracking capabilities for retail investors.
projects.longDescription: A sophisticated financial dashboard that aggregates data from multiple sources, provides real-time analysis, and uses machine learning to identify market trends and investment opportunities.

projects.title: Smart Healthcare Appointment System
projects.description: Created an intuitive scheduling platform connecting patients with healthcare providers, featuring real-time availability, automated reminders, and telemedicine integration.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive healthcare management system that streamlines the appointment booking process, reduces no-shows through intelligent reminders, and integrates video consultation capabilities.

projects.title: Fraud Detection ML Pipeline
projects.description: Implemented an anomaly detection system for identifying suspicious financial transactions using machine learning algorithms and real-time data processing.
projects.longDescription: An enterprise-grade fraud detection system that analyzes transaction patterns in real-time, flags suspicious activities, and continuously learns from new data to improve accuracy.

projects.title: Interactive Data Visualization Platform
projects.description: Developed a web-based platform for creating interactive data visualizations with real-time collaboration features and AI-assisted chart recommendations.
projects.longDescription: A powerful data visualization tool that helps users create compelling visual stories from complex datasets, with intelligent suggestions for the best chart types and layouts.
